steps.t: The entrance to the Mirror-halls of Lumul-nar is outside, on Zirakzigil, near the ruined crater where the Balrog lies smouldering. Bróin believes that…
Bróin is in the Peaceful Path, located between Zirakzigil and Durin's Way. You have destroyed the relic Gorothúl gave to the merrevail in Lumul-nar an…
